SELECT sprintf_inverse(value, 'qwe%d', 2) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS subquery;
SELECT sprintf_inverse(value, '---%d', 0) FROM (SELECT value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS inner_query);
SELECT sprintf_inverse(value, '%%d', 1) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'qwe%') AS filtered;
SELECT sprintf_inverse(t.value, a.pattern, 2) FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.value LIKE a.pattern;
